personality_traits: slow to move but solid in position
speaking_style: Grounded and direct. Uses craft metaphors without noticing. Has strong opinions about whether things are well-made and will share them unprompted. Doesn't dress up the truth.
backstory_seeds: has a dispute with the guild over an apprentice who left his service without completing the term
just finished a significant commission and is allowing himself one evening to celebrate before the next job
frustrated by the quality of iron available lately and blames the merchants who control the supply
training an apprentice who has real talent but no discipline, which is a problem he is unsure how to solve
was asked to repair a sword that he suspects was used in something he would rather not know about
has done work for the local lord and has opinions about the lord he keeps mostly to himself
